title: Library Loop
lore: Sampled from a library HVAC vent and stretched until the due dates stopped mattering — Jay-Zzz calls it reference material.
artistPersona: Chillhop producer for people who fell asleep on the train and missed their stop. Beats so soft they snore in 4/4.
albumConcept: Jay-Zzz's white-noise appendix — softer than The Blueprint Nap, built for desks that never alarm.
